# LogOutUserCommand

**Device Management Command**

The command to force the current user to log out of a device.

## Declaration

```swift
object LogOutUserCommand
```

## Objects

- **LogOutUserCommand.Command**: The command to force the current user to log out of a device.

## Commands and responses

- **LogOutUserResponse**: A response from the device after it processes the command to force the current user to log out of a device.
